summary: Backend testing complete for Social Feed & Night Builder APIs. All 40 tests passed. Tested: Event interests (public/friends/private visibility), social feed with visibility rules, likes/unlikes, night plans (CRUD), polls (create/vote/close), and Instagram route removal verification.
critical_code_review_comments: Social feed correctly implements visibility rules: public posts visible to all, friends-only to friends, private only to creator
Points system working: 5pts for expressing interest, 10pts for creating night plan, 5pts for accepting invite
Vibe score calculation correct: (confirmed_members * 20) + (stops * 10), capped at 100
Duplicate interest correctly updates visibility instead of creating new entry
Poll voting allows changing vote (removes previous vote before adding new)
Only poll creator can close poll (403 for non-creators)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed activities, night plans, and polls during testing. Test data includes: event interests with various visibility settings, night plans with multiple stops, polls with voting.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Feed & Night Builder APIs fully functional. Test user luna@test.com has multiple social activities, night plans, and polls. Existing data from previous iterations: event interest for ef_399720, night plan plan_f8423043 (may be inaccessible), poll poll_64b1bd5d. Instagram routes are removed and return 404.

event_interest: POST /api/social/interest (PASS) - Express public interest, earns 5 pts
POST /api/social/interest (PASS) - Duplicate updates visibility instead of creating new
social_feed: GET /api/social/feed (PASS) - Returns activity feed with liked_by_me enrichment
GET /api/social/feed (PASS) - Feed items have required fields (id, type, user_id, visibility, created_at)
event_interested: GET /api/social/interested/{event_id} (PASS) - Get who's interested with visibility rules
night_plans: POST /api/social/night-plan (PASS) - Create plan with multiple stops, earns 10 pts
POST /api/social/night-plan/{plan_id}/respond?accept=true (PASS) - Accept invite, earns 5 pts, updates vibe score
polls: POST /api/social/poll (PASS) - Create poll within night plan
GET /api/social/poll/{poll_id} (PASS) - Get poll results with my_vote
POST /api/social/poll/{poll_id}/close (PASS) - Close poll and determine winner
POST /api/social/poll/{poll_id}/vote (PASS) - Cannot vote on closed poll (400)
